While driving my 2018 Ram 2500, the Service Electrical Breaking System and Service Anti-locking Break System flashes on and off. It usually does this while traveling on a bumpy road or driving over railroad tracks. Sometimes it will go days without coming on and some days while d

narrative.headline: 2018 Ram 2500: service brakes dominate owner complaints
narrative.summary: Service brake performance is the dominant concern among owners of this truck, with reports describing the vehicle failing to stop adequately under emergency braking conditions, including when towing. Electrical system faults, hydraulic warning light activations, and unwanted speed control behavior round out the most-reported issues, several of which have been associated with crashes.

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: Owners report that under maximum emergency braking the truck stops poorly, as if the brakes are wet, and the vehicle continues moving rather than stopping — a problem noted even when towing a trailer downhill. · 27 crash · 2 injured

issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2018 RAM 2500. THE CONTACT STATED THAT THE U-CONNECT SCREEN PERIODICALLY FAILED TO FUNCTION, WHICH IMPACTED THE FUNCTIONALITY OF THE SOS FEATURE BUILT INTO THE REARVIEW MIRRORS. THE DEALER (FREMONT MOTOR, 6101 E 2ND ST, CASPER, WY 82609, 307-237-8491) SCHED
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report the Uconnect screen periodically failing to function, which in turn affects the SOS feature built into the rearview mirrors. · 6 crash

issues.title: Hydraulic
issues.blurb: Owners report ABS and traction control warning lights illuminating while driving at highway speed, accompanied by the cruise control disengaging and the vehicle decelerating on its own. · 9 crash

issues.title: Vehicle Speed Control
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle failing to accelerate from a stop and, at times, operating as if it were acting independently of driver input. · 2 crash

issues.title: Forward Collision Avoidance
issues.blurb: 223 complaints (9%), including 1 crash. One owner reports the service-braking and anti-lock-braking warnings flashing on and off, often on bumpy roads or over railroad tracks.
